headline: Sempra’s New Debt, Texas Grid Wins, Port Arthur Milestone Might Change The Case For Investing In SRE
summary: In early June 2026, Sempra completed a US$1.00 billion offering of senior unsecured floating-rate notes due January 7, 2028, while its Oncor subsidiary was endorsed to build most of over US$7.00 billion of planned Texas transmission projects, and Sempra Infrastructure brought the Port Arthur Pipeline Louisiana Connector online ahead of schedule and below budget. Together, these moves tighten Sempra’s funding, expand its Texas and Gulf Coast infrastructure footprint, and sharpen investor...

headline: Sempra Announces New Growth Opportunities in Texas
summary: Sempra (NYSE: SRE) today announced new developments in Texas relating to last week's endorsement by the Electric Reliability Council of Texas (ERCOT) of several new transmission projects serving the southern Dallas–Fort Worth area and the I-35 corridor. Together with a series of other high voltage upgrades in the southern Dallas–Fort Worth area endorsed by ERCOT in April, these projects are expected to require new investment of over $7 billion. headline: Sempra Brings Key Gulf Coast Gas Pipeline Online for Port Arthur LNG
summary: Sempra Infrastructure has placed its Port Arthur Pipeline Louisiana Connector into service, creating a critical link that will supply up to 2 Bcf/d of natural gas to the under-construction Port Arthur LNG export facility.

raw.headline: Sempra Brings Key Gulf Coast Gas Pipeline Online for Port Arthur LNG
raw.summary: Sempra Infrastructure has placed its Port Arthur Pipeline Louisiana Connector into service, creating a critical link that will supply up to 2 Bcf/d of natural gas to the under-construction Port Arthur LNG export facility.
